name: azeroth-talent-forge
description: Local World of Warcraft talent planning tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Build and verify WoW talent planner links locally.
interface.longDescription: Azeroth Talent Forge adds local Codex skills and scripts for World of Warcraft talent planning, Wowhead planner links, and Blizzard import strings.
interface.defaultPrompt: Plan a World of Warcraft talent build and generate a Wowhead link plus import code.
